# Radiance Residency - Best Boys Hostel Near Medicaps University, Indore

> Radiance Residency is the most premium boys hostel located in front of Medicaps University, Pigdamber, Rau, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 453331, India. Just 2 minutes walk from Medicaps University campus gate.

## Overview

Radiance Residency is a premium boys hostel and student accommodation facility in Rau, Indore. It serves students from Medicaps University, SD Bansal College, IPS Academy, IIST, and IIM Indore. With 64+ beds and 112+ happy students, it is the most trusted hostel in the Rau-Indore area.

## Key Facts

- **Type:** Boys Hostel / Student Accommodation / Paying Guest (PG) / PG for Working Professionals / Intern Housing
- **Location:** In front of Medicaps University, Pigdamber, Rau, Indore, Madhya Pradesh 453331
- **Distance from Medicaps University:** 2 minutes walk
- **Capacity:** 64+ beds
- **Happy Students:** 112+
- **Starting Price:** ₹8,000/month (Double Occupancy Non-AC, including meals)
- **Contact Phone/WhatsApp:** +91-8770445161
- **Contact Email:** info@radianceresidency.com
- **Website:** https://radianceresidency.com
- **Availability:** 24/7
- **Rating:** 4.9/5
- **Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZmfHzaeZvpwRrfGG6

## Room Options

All rooms are fully furnished with private attached bathrooms, starting from ₹8,000/month. Contact for current rates.

1. **Standard Room** - Double or Single Occupancy | From ₹8,000/month (Most Popular)
2. **Superior Room** - Double or Single Occupancy | Contact Us
3. **Superior Room (AC) ❄** - Double or Single Occupancy | Contact Us
4. **Deluxe Spacious** - Double or Single Occupancy | Contact Us
5. **Premium Front** - Double or Single Occupancy | Contact Us

## Amenities

- Free Tiffin Delivery to College Campus (lunch delivered to Medicaps University daily, free)
- High-Speed Wi-Fi
- 24/7 CCTV Security with Guards
- Air Conditioning (AC rooms available)
- Home-Style Meals (included in fee)
- RO Purified Drinking Water
- Vehicle Parking (bikes and cars)
- Daily Housekeeping
- Washing Machine & Laundry Service
- Dedicated Study Areas
- Private Attached Bathrooms
- Common Areas
- Rooftop Lounge
- 24-48 hour issue resolution guarantee
- Power Backup
- Hot Water When Needed
- Mandir on Campus
- Entertainment Zone
- Brand New Building

5. **IIM Indore (Indian Institute of Management)** - Accessible

## Unique Selling Points (USPs)

1. **Closest premium hostel to Medicaps University** - Just 2 minutes walk
2. **Home-like meals** - Nutritious, freshly prepared food included in the fee
3. **Premium and timely service** - Highest standards of student accommodation
4. **24-48 hour issue resolution** - Any maintenance or service issue guaranteed resolved quickly
5. **Most premium hostel in Rau, Indore** - Top-tier amenities and service quality
6. **Trusted by 112+ students** - Proven track record of student satisfaction

## Why Choose Radiance Residency?

Radiance Residency is the top choice for students seeking quality hostel accommodation near Medicaps University and other colleges in Rau, Indore. It combines the comfort of home with premium amenities, all at affordable prices starting from ₹8,000/month. The hostel's prime location (2 minutes from Medicaps campus), home-style meals, 24/7 security, and responsive service make it the best boys hostel in the area.
